decks.notes: The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. It utilizes powerful disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push, alongside creatures like Witch Enchanter and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to control the board and deal damage quickly. The deck also includes cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Ephemerate to provide additional value and versatility. Overall, the deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while establishing a strong board presence to quickly close out the game.

This deck focuses on assembling powerful combos and utilizing unique cards to disrupt opponents. It combines Leyline Binding and Indomitable Creativity to generate tokens and remove threats. The deck also includes various versatile spells like Galvanic Discharge and Prismatic Ending to control the board. Teferi, Time Raveler and Wrenn and Six provide additional utility and card advantage. The deck's win condition is Fable of the Mirror-Breaker, which can create a game-winning board state when paired with the right cards like Archon of Cruelty or Valgavoth, Terror Eater.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quick and aggressive creature plays, supported by removal spells and enchantments to protect and boost your creatures. Utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient offense. The inclusion of burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Goblin Bombardment provides additional reach to finish off opponents. With a mix of creatures, removal, and burn spells, this deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control of the board throughout the game.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting and controlling the opponent's game plan through counterspells, removal spells, hand disruption, and threat manipulation. By utilizing a combination of powerful creatures, efficient removal, and disruptive spells, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent while maintaining control of the game. The deck also includes graveyard hate and card advantage engines to further enhance its control elements. With a mix of disruption and threats, this deck seeks to dominate the game through a carefully executed control strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to apply pressure. It also includes cards that can provide additional support such as Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls. The deck aims to establish early board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game, using efficient removal spells like Galvanic Discharge to control the opponent's board. Additionally, cards like Goblin Bombardment and Arena of Glory provide additional reach and utility to close out the game.

This Boros Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures and strategic spellcasting. It focuses on quick, efficient plays to deal damage and control the battlefield. Cards like Goblin Bombardment, Galvanic Discharge, and Thraben Charm provide removal and direct damage, while powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer deliver heavy hits. The deck also includes Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for token generation and board presence. The combination of creatures, spells, and mana sources allows for a fast-paced, punishing playstyle that keeps opponents on their toes.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. By disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Fatal Push and Sheoldred's Edict, while also generating card advantage through Consult the Star Charts and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and outvalue the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Cling to Dust and Field of Ruin also provides the deck with additional tools to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain control over the battlefield.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Phelia and Phlage to pressure the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Teferi and Solitude. Quantum Riddler and Ragavan provide card advantage and tempo advantage, allowing the deck to maintain pressure while answering threats. The deck also utilizes powerful removal options like Consign to Memory and other control elements like March of Otherworldly Light to keep the opponent on the back foot. With a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on creating a powerful combo with Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to generate a large amount of mana and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It utilizes cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Kozilek's Command to control the board and protect the combo pieces. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and resilient strategy that can quickly close out the game. It also includes cards like Emrakul, the Promised End for late-game power and disruption. The deck is designed to be proactive and versatile, able to adapt to different matchups and strategies.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and affinity creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. It includes cards like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to generate value and board presence. Engineered Explosives, Urza's Saga, and Mishra's Bauble help to accelerate the deck and provide additional utility. The inclusion of spells like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt allows for disruption and control over the game. Overall, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and use a combination of artifacts and creatures to pressure the opponent.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Solitude. It also includes various removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Consign to Memory to control the board. The deck aims to pressure the opponent with its creatures while taxing their resources and disrupting their plays, ultimately winning through quick and efficient aggression while keeping the opponent off balance.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Amulet of Vigor to effectively ramp up your mana and play powerful spells like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift. By utilizing cards like Arboreal Grazer and Lotus Field, you can quickly generate a large amount of mana to overwhelm your opponent with big threats. The deck also includes toolbox cards like Green Sun's Zenith to search for key pieces and Malevolent Rumble to deal with opposing threats. Overall, the deck is designed to create explosive turns and overwhelm the opponent with powerful combo plays.

The deck focuses on utilizing Tameshi, Reality Architect and Lotus Bloom to generate mana quickly and efficiently without relying on traditional lands. It aims to disrupt opponents with counterspells and suppression effects while assembling key pieces such as Hydroelectric Specimen and Goblin Charbelcher to execute a game-winning combo. The deck utilizes a mix of card draw, tutoring, and interaction to control the pace of the game and ensure its combo can go off smoothly. Key cards like Whir of Invention and Jwari Disruption help set up the combo while protecting it from disruptions.

The main concept of this UW Control deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage provided by cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Meticulous Archive. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building towards its own win condition, which could be a combination of card advantage engines and powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. The deck also includes some unique cards like Consult the Star Charts and Stock Up to help filter through the deck and find the necessary resources to stay in control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively overwhelm the opponent by playing low-cost and efficient cards such as Monastery Swiftspear, Lightning Bolt, and Lava Dart. The deck aims to maintain a fast pace by utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration to draw into more threats and removal spells. The inclusion of cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Dragon's Rage Channeler also adds to the aggressive nature of the deck, while cards like Fiery Islet and Mutagenic Growth help to provide additional reach and protection for the creatures.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells while utilizing powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to generate advantage. The deck includes cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer to apply pressure early on, supported by cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge for removal and reach. The deck also includes key enchantments like Arena of Glory and Elegant Parlor to support the aggressive game plan and close out games quickly with cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury.
